meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Get in touch about AI workflow, automation, and internal tooling roles.

sections.learningNote: If you have feedback on my work, I welcome it. Practical input from real operators helps improve the systems I build.
sections.intro: If you are exploring an AI automation role, internal workflow tooling, or a build problem that needs structure and speed, feel free to reach out.
sections.workWithMe: I work at the intersection of AI workflows, operations, and product delivery - designing and shipping systems that are useful, traceable, and reliable.
sections.auroraNote: If you are curious about Aurora, I am open to high-level conversations about intent-first conversational systems and explainable agent behavior.
sections.confirmationMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I will review your message and respond soon.
